gap_analysis.status: FREE AI is vendored and validated locally in vendor/free-ai, but GS FOOD Python server (in server/app) doesn't use it yet.
gap_analysis.current_python: Contains main.py, orchestrator.py, meal_agent.py, planner_agent.py, but they appear to be legacy/standalone agent implementations instead of proxying intelligence to the much stronger vendored Node.js FREE AI engine.
gap_analysis.missing: A Python unified client (e.g. FreeAIClient) to safely bridge requests via localhost:3000 to the Node.js FREE AI engine.
gap_analysis.endpoint_sync_gap: The new gs_food_pantry_lookup skill inside FREE AI points to http://localhost:8000/api/internal/pantry/inventory, which doesn't exist or isn't well-defined in main.py.
gap_analysis.ui_gap: UI expects unified endpoints from Fastapi/Flask that serve AI responses and recipes.
